employee-service-consumer/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update import statements to reference exceptions from the new common module package structure.
Remove the unused Primary annotation import that is no longer needed in this class.

Reformat OpenAPI annotation attributes to a compact single-line style per attribute.
Reorder import statements to group third-party imports before Spring imports.
Condense the Javadoc comment for the configuration class into a single line.
Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use the new lambda DSL and Customizer API introduced in Spring Security 6.
Apply Spotless code formatter changes to indentation and import ordering.
Replace explicit ResponseEntity wrappers with direct return types and @ResponseStatus annotations to simplify controller logic.
Move DTO and Exception imports from local package to shared common artifact package.
Rename EmployeeRequest to EmployeeInfo to better reflect the data structure's purpose.
Replace Spring Data Page with custom EmployeePage DTO to decouple API response from internal pagination implementation.
Change delete endpoint return type from ResponseEntity<String> to void, relying on @ResponseStatus for HTTP code.
Apply Spotless code formatting rules to standardize indentation and annotation placement.
Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the shared common artifact.
Remove imports for Hibernate annotations that are no longer used in the class.
Remove explicit UUID generation strategy annotations, likely relying on application-level ID generation or database defaults instead.
Reformat field declarations to use single-line style as enforced by the Spotless plugin.
Move DTO imports to a shared common module package structure.
Replace EmployeeRequest with EmployeeInfo to align with new domain model.
Add mapping method from EmployeeDto to Employee entity.
Add mapping method from EmployeeInfo to Employee entity.
Remove obsolete mapping method from EmployeeRequest to Employee.
Apply Spotless code formatting to indentation and import ordering.
Update imports to reflect the migration of DTOs and enums to a common module.
Remove .name() call on enum status to align with updated DTO structure.
Replace deprecated Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() for Java 16+ compatibility.
Update method signature to use EmployeeDto instead of the removed EmployeeRequest class.
Add new conversion method for EmployeeInfo DTO to support new data flow.
Handle nullable status in EmployeeInfo conversion using Optional.
Replace JPA repository interface with MongoDB repository interface to support the database migration.
